title: Pack of 10 noble bottle gift bags gold for wine sparkling wine and champagne 36 cm x 12 cm x 10 cm - 14.17" x 4.72" x 3.94"
features: ROBUST PAPER MATERIAL: Sturdy and durable, perfect for packaging wine gifts
SUITABLE FOR WINE BOTTLES: Perfect for the festive packaging of wine, prosecco and champagne
HIGH QUALITY PRINTING: Give your gifts a special touch with our bottle bags. The high-quality print ensures an appealing design and leaves a lasting impression
STABLE CARRYING GRIP: Our bottle bags offer a stylish and secure way to gift bottles of wine. Suitable for various occasions such as birthdays, Christmas or as an elegant souvenir
10 BOTTLE BAGS IN A SET: The ideal choice for a stylish and practical wine gift. With these high-quality gift bags, you can package and present 10 bottles of wine, prosecco or champagne in style
description: Product Description Beautifully shaped bottle bags in different colours for wine bottles In a bottle bag, every good wine can be made visually appealing as a gift. Therefore, the trendily designed bags made of sturdy paper or cardboardare a sensible alternative to simple wrapping paper. A sturdy cord ensures safety when handing over the liquid gift so that every wine, every sparkling wine and every luxurious champagne reaches the recipient without damage. The high-quality bottle bags are available in many beautiful colours such as dark blue, purple and grey. The sturdy bags fit narrow wine bottles and most champagne and prosecco bottles with a thicker circumference. Tear-resistant material as a gift bag for high-quality wines Since the reinforced paper of the bottle bags, which has the quality of a thin cardboard box as gift packaging, is additionally provided with a foil, the modern models have a high tear resistance. Therefore, each of the bags is designed with great attention to detail and is also suitable for longer transport of a bottle of wine, sparkling wine or liqueur. Even a well-stocked whisky can fit in one of the durable bottle bags. For every beautifully shaped bag, the designers have chosen a cord in a matching colour. That is why the unique look when handing over the gift also delights discerning customers. The sturdy cords tighten at the top of the bags when carried, so they are reminiscent of ornate ribbons. The entire design of these reusable bottle bags has succeeded harmoniously, from the dimensions matched to standard bottles to the trendy colours of the paper and cord. Va rious motifs on the colourful bottle bags T he attractive bottle bagis also available with imaginative patterns so that the selection of beautiful gift packaging in the shape of a bag can be permanently varied while gifting delicious wines. The bags feature ornaments in contrasting colours as well as champagne and prosecco flutes. Silhouettes of bottles and glasses as well as vines, grapes and lettering complete the wide range of attractive designs. The dimensionally stable bottle bags are available in packs of ten. Depending on the model, the bags have the dimensions 36 x 12 x 10 centimetres or 40 x 12 x 9 centimetres. For everybody who likes to hand over good wine as packaged gifts in precious metal colours, there are also bottle bags in the colours gold and silver. These shiny models are also available in the 9-pack with three silver-coloured, three gold-coloured and three black bags. Highlights: Our bottle bags are suitable for wine, sparkling wine and champagne bottles. The sturdy bottle bags as well as the noble cords were made of high-quality materials. We offer a large selection of bottle bag sets in different colors and designs. Key Facts: High-grade materials sturdy bottle bags Durable carton Beautiful gift idea Modern colours Various designs The DonDon brand is a new accessory brand with a wide range of stainless steel jewellery as well as ties, braces and bow ties. In addition, we also offer bags such as beach bags, bottle bags and drybags. Our goal is to combine trendy lifestyle with originality and style. We use selected materials and make sure we maintain an excellent value for money. DonDon's style can best be described with the terms high-quality, stylish, urban, individual, fashionable and timeless. Casual elegance is just as fitting as cool understatement. Highlights: Good value for money Fair production conditions Modern designs High-quality materials Very good workmanship
